description_long: This hardware store is a boxy, modern commercial building with a flat, patterned gray roof and a predominantly light gray facade. The front features a large glass entrance framed by bold blue and yellow geometric accents, giving it a contemporary and inviting appearance. The signage on the upper left of the facade displays the 'asuransi Jasindo' logo and text in white and yellow, adding a professional touch. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with no windows or additional architectural details, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The entrance area is recessed, providing a sheltered entryway, while the rest of the structure is solid and windowless. The overall look is clean, functional, and designed for high visibility in an urban environment.
description: A modern, box-shaped hardware store with a flat gray roof, bold blue and yellow accents, and prominent signage on a plain light gray facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with blue and yellow framing, glass doors, and visible 'asuransi Jasindo' signage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain, windowless gray wall and a glimpse of the blue and yellow entrance structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely featureless gray wall and the flat patterned roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another plain gray wall and partial visibility of the entrance structure.
attribute_storefront_signage: The signage consists of the 'asuransi Jasindo' logo and text in white and yellow, placed on the upper left of the facade against a blue background.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a large, glass double-door entrance framed by blue and yellow geometric elements, with the rest of the facade being plain and windowless. The signage is positioned on the upper left, and there are no visible display areas or exterior windows.
